name: jerrys-personal-marketplace
description: Curated marketplace of Claude Code plugins for specialized domains. Features quantitative finance, education, and more.

plugins.name: finance-pack
plugins.description: Institutional-grade quantitative finance toolkit with 15 firm-based agents, 11 analytical skills, and portfolio analysis command. Covers systematic trading, risk management, alpha signals, factor models, backtesting, execution algorithms, and compliance using methodologies from Goldman Sachs, Renaissance Technologies, Two Sigma, Citadel, Jane Street, AQR, D.E. Shaw, Bridgewater, Bloomberg, Virtu, Point72, Man Group, Millennium, and Dimensional Fund Advisors.

plugins.name: middle-schooler
plugins.description: Education and tutoring toolkit for middle school academic competitions. Features a spelling bee instructor with NLP-powered word analysis and a National Science Bowl (NSB) instructor with curriculum synthesis across Life Science, Physical Science, Earth and Space Science, Math, Energy, and General Science.
